recentChanges: v10.0.0: Separate marketplace, native plugin updates, cross-platform hooks, repo restructure

v9.2.0: Rich GitHub Issues from PRD — default issue creation, rich bodies, two-pass dependency linking
v9.1.0: Autonomous context isolation — subagent-per-feature delegation, memory continuity, team containment
v9.0.0: Agent Teams with ATDD — opt-in --team flag, 3 new hooks, Gherkin acceptance criteria
